Class Player

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.cascadia.game.Player
Record Components:
name - the name of the player
board - the player's game board
public class Player extends Object
Represents a player in the Cascadia game, responsible for placing tiles and animals on their board and calculating scores.

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String name, Environnement board, SuccessManager successManager)
      Constructs a new Player.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the player
      board - the player's game board
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if name or board is null

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of the player.
      Returns:
      the name of the player

    • getBoard

      public Environnement getBoard()
      Returns the player's game board.
      Returns:
      the player's game board

    • getNatureTokens

      public int getNatureTokens()
      Returns the player's nature tokens.
      Returns:
      the player's game board

      public void addNatureToken()

    • removeNatureToken

      public void removeNatureToken()

    • getScoreCalculator

      public ScoreCalculator getScoreCalculator()

    • chooseLot

      public TileAnimalPair chooseLot(GameLot availableLot)
      Allows the player to choose a TileAnimalPair from the available lots.
      Parameters:
      availableLot - the current available lot of tiles and animals
      Returns:
      the chosen TileAnimalPair
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if availableLot is null

    • validInput

      public boolean validInput(String sx, String sy)
      Validates if the input coordinates are valid positive integers.
      Parameters:
      sx - the input string for the x-coordinate
      sy - the input string for the y-coordinate
      Returns:
      true if the inputs are valid coordinates, false otherwise
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if sx or sy is null

    • tilePlacing

      public void tilePlacing(Tile tile)
      Allows the player to place a tile on the board.
      Parameters:
      tile - the tile to place
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if tile is null

    • animalPlacing

      public void animalPlacing(Animal animal)
      Allows the player to place an animal on the board.
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to place
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if animal is null

    • playTour

      public TileAnimalPair playTour(GameLot availableLot, FauneBag animals)
      Executes the player's turn, where they choose a tile and place it along with an animal.
      Parameters:
      availableLot - the available lot of tiles and animals
      animals - the FauneBag containing all animals in the game
      Returns:
      the chosen TileAnimalPair
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if availableLot or animals is null

    • playTourViewCarre

      public TileAnimalPair playTourViewCarre(GameViewSquare gameViewsquare, com.github.forax.zen.ApplicationContext context, int lotStartX, int lotStartY, FauneBag animals)

    • playTourViewHex

      public void playTourViewHex(GameViewHex gameView, com.github.forax.zen.ApplicationContext context, int lotStartX, int lotStartY, Tiles tiles, FauneBag animals)

    • saveAchievements

      public void saveAchievements(Map<Animal,Integer> animalScores, Map<Habitat,Integer> habitatScores, int totalScore)
      Saves the player's achievements to a file located in the "ressources/success" directory. The file includes the player's total score, nature tokens, scores by habitat and animal, and the list of achieved successes.
      Parameters:
      animalScores - a map containing the scores of animals
      habitatScores - a map containing the scores of habitats
      totalScore - the player's total score
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if animalScores or habitatScores is null
